title: centaurea ornata subsp. interrupta
intro: Centaurea ornata subsp. interrupta, also known as Mountain Bluet, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the daisy family Asteraceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids. The health benefits of Centaurea ornata subsp. interrupta include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Centaurea ornata subsp. interrupta can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat various health conditions, including skin issues and respiratory problems.
